case_title: ALBERT CORTEZ VS. MICHELE HICKERSON LEDBETTER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-01-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-06-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, ALBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEDBETTER, MICHELE HICKERSON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE SUBJECT COLLISION CAUSED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMED INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CORTEZ, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT LEDBETTER, MICHELE HICKERSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION THAT DEFT HAS NOT BEEN SERVED WITH THE CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT LEDBETTER, MICHELE HICKERSON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-14-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEDBETTER, MICHELE HICKERSON
